workflows.name: Sign in with valid credentials
workflows.on_success: flash 'Signed in successfully.' and redirect to Accounts Overview page

workflows.name: Register form submission (creates account on valid input)
workflows.on_success: Account created successfully — please sign in

workflows.name: Click Account Number link in a row
workflows.on_success: Clickable but not implemented yet

workflows.name: Open Checking account (meets Checking minimum)
workflows.on_success: Account opened successfully! Redirect to Accounts Overview

workflows.name: Open Savings account (meets Savings minimum)
workflows.on_success: Account opened successfully! Redirect to Accounts Overview

workflows.name: Internal transfer between ParaBank accounts
workflows.on_success: Transfer completed successfully. Returns transaction ID.

workflows.name: External transfer to an external account
workflows.on_success: Transfer completed successfully. Returns transaction ID.

workflows.name: Submit bill payment (Pay)
workflows.on_success: Payment submitted successfully. Returns a confirmation reference and updates account balances.

workflows.name: Submit Personal Loan application
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! Display created loan and associated account details. Note: No actual balance debits occur in this mock system.

workflows.name: Submit Auto Loan application
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! Display created loan and associated account details. Note: No actual balance debits occur in this mock system.

workflows.name: Submit Home Loan application
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! Display created loan and associated account details. Note: No actual balance debits occur in this mock system.

workflows.name: Update existing customer contact details
workflows.on_success: Profile updated successfully and refreshes profile data.

workflows.name: Request new card
workflows.on_success: Opens a card-request ticket; Card request submitted successfully. Returns tracking ID.

workflows.name: Update card controls (no travel notice)
workflows.on_success: Card controls updated successfully.

workflows.name: Update card controls (with travel notice)
workflows.on_success: Card controls updated successfully.

workflows.name: Execute Trade — Buy
workflows.on_success: Trade executed successfully. Returns Order ID and updates holdings.

workflows.name: Execute Trade — Sell
workflows.on_success: Trade executed successfully. Returns Order ID and updates holdings.

workflows.name: Create Recurring Investment Plan
workflows.on_success: Plan created successfully. Schedule stored.

workflows.name: Generate statement — Month and Year
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully.

workflows.name: Generate statement — Custom Date Range
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully.

workflows.name: Save e-statement preference — Opt In (email visible)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Save e-statement preference — Opt Out (email hidden)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Change Password
workflows.on_success: Password changed successfully.

workflows.name: Send secure message via Secure_Message_Form
workflows.on_success: Message sent successfully; returns ticket ID

workflows.name: Submit schedule callback via Schedule_Callback_Form
workflows.on_success: Callback request submitted; sends email confirmation
